title: RootstockScanResult
description: Output schema for the Rootstock macOS security collector.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the scan was initiated.

elevation.description: Privilege context under which the collector ran.

is_root.description: True if the collector ran as root (uid 0).

has_fda.description: True if Full Disk Access was available (system TCC.db readable).

applications.description: Discovered .app bundles with entitlement and code signing metadata.

tcc_grants.description: TCC permission grants from user and system TCC databases.

xpc_services.description: Discovered XPC services from LaunchDaemon and LaunchAgent plists.

keychain_acls.description: Keychain item metadata and ACL trusted-application lists (no secret values).

mdm_profiles.description: Installed MDM configuration profiles and their TCC policy payloads.

launch_items.description: Persistence mechanisms: LaunchDaemons, LaunchAgents, login items, cron jobs.

errors.description: Non-fatal collection errors encountered during the scan.

version.description: CFBundleShortVersionString, or null if not present.

team_id.description: Apple Developer team identifier from the code signature, or null for platform/unsigned binaries.

hardened_runtime.description: True if the CS_RUNTIME (0x10000) code signing flag is set.

library_validation.description: True if effective library validation is in force (CS_REQUIRE_LV flag or hardened runtime without disable-library-validation entitlement).

is_electron.description: True if the app bundles the Electron Framework.

is_system.description: True if the app is located under /System/.

signed.description: True if the binary has a code signature with a signing identifier.

entitlements.description: Code-signing entitlements extracted from the binary.

injection_methods.description: Injection techniques applicable to this app based on its security posture.

is_security_critical.description: True for entitlements that materially weaken security boundaries.

InjectionMethod.description: A method by which code could be injected into this app's process.

TCCGrant.description: A TCC permission grant from the macOS privacy database.

client.description: Bundle ID or binary path of the client requesting the permission.

client_type.description: TCC client type: 0 = bundle, 1 = absolute path.

auth_value.description: TCC authorization value: 0 = deny, 2 = allow, 3 = limited.

last_modified.description: Unix timestamp of when the grant was last modified.

XPCService.description: A launchd-managed XPC service discovered from a LaunchDaemon or LaunchAgent plist.

path.description: Path to the LaunchDaemon/LaunchAgent plist file.

program.description: Resolved binary path from Program or ProgramArguments[0].

type.description: Whether this is a daemon or agent.

user.description: UserName from plist (null = current user for agents).

run_at_load.description: Whether launchd starts the service automatically.

keep_alive.description: Whether launchd restarts the service after exit.

mach_services.description: Mach service names registered by this service.

entitlements.description: Entitlement keys present in the service binary.

KeychainItem.description: Keychain item metadata and ACL. No secret values are included.

label.description: Human-readable label from the item metadata.

service.description: Service name (generic password) or server hostname (internet password).

trusted_apps.description: Bundle IDs or paths of apps trusted to read this item without prompting.

tcc_policies.description: TCC permission policies declared in this profile.

TCCPolicy.description: A TCC permission grant or denial enforced via MDM profile.

service.description: TCC service name as used in the profile.

client_bundle_id.description: Bundle identifier of the target application.

allowed.description: Whether this policy grants (true) or denies (false) access.

LaunchItem.description: A persistence mechanism: launchd job, login item, cron job, or login hook.

label.description: Label or identifier for this persistence item.

path.description: Path to the plist, crontab, or hook configuration file.

program.description: Binary or script that is executed.

run_at_load.description: Whether the item starts automatically at boot or login.

user.description: User account this item runs as (null = inherits from context).

CollectionError.description: A non-fatal error encountered during data collection.

source.description: Name of the module that produced the error.

recoverable.description: True if collection continued despite this error.
